name: Ceremonial Armor
description: Judging by the engraving, it once belonged to Sir der Ulne, a famous glutton and a drunkard. A dozen years ago, during one of his feasts, Sir der Ulne met a heroic death in a prolonged battle with a whole roast hog.
descriptionZh: 从上面的铭文来看，这件胸甲原本属于大名鼎鼎的酒鬼饕客德·伍恩爵士。十几年前，德·伍恩爵士英勇赴宴，与一头烤全猪鏖战几百回合，最后壮烈牺牲。
